_comment: Feature list as a harness PRIMITIVE, not a memo. Every row has behavior + verification + state (+ evidence). The agent may set state to 'active' and request verification, but only the harness/verifier moves a row to 'passing' after the verification command succeeds with attached evidence. Keep each feature one-session-sized. States: not_started | active | blocked | passing. Enforce WIP=1: at most one 'active' row.

features.behavior: User can register: POST /api/register with email+password returns 201 and creates a user
User can add an item to cart: POST /cart/items returns 201
features.verification: make e2e-cart  # exercises UI -> service -> db
